endpoints.name: Dark Vassal trio (King Piccolo's spat-egg children — Tambourine / Cymbal / Drum)

description: S-sorry, sir, Mr. Nodeley here again — I do hope you don't mind. The Dark Vassal cycle has the Bandai-explicit cycle markers right there on the prints (adjacent collector numbers BT4-064/065/066 within Colossal Warfare, shared 'Dark Vassal' card-name prefix, all three orally-spat children of King Piccolo per Toriyama's 1976 Dragon Ball manga chapters 134-194), and the [[namekian]] parent's own Caveats section already flagged this trio as the warranted child-cycle-node deferred from wave 62 — so I thought it only proper to commission it now under the same parent. The cycle is a child-of-parent shape (the same precedent as [[eld-cinderella-cycle]] sitting as a child of the broader ELD design space) and the three cards now carry `characters: [dark-vassal-trio, namekian]` to anchor at both the cycle and the race level. Piano (the fourth canonical King Piccolo child, non-combat secretary-type) is deliberately excluded from the cycle scope and is not in BBL corpus regardless. I really do hope this helps.
citations: [Dragon Ball manga, Toriyama / Shueisha, King Piccolo Saga chapters 134-194, 1976-1978]
[dbs-cardgame.com: Colossal Warfare BT4 per-card pages for BT4-064 / BT4-065 / BT4-066]
